title: Options panel settings should be auto-saved
author: igor2x
body_snippet:
Downloaded mRemoteNG v1.78.2 NB 3224 I have looked at the File | Options design again, because it just feels not the best UI/UX. This is maybe continuation of [issue 2909](https://github.com/mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG/issues/2909) where we discussed what should happen when Option panel is closed down. That issue looked like a bug, but this issue is more about enhancement.

Lets step back a little bit. How did File | Options work few NB releases ago? Options were opened as dialog and in dialog it is cus...

iterations.description: Bulk verified: commit bb289379 exists (HIGH confidence)

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `bb289379` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:** Add change event handlers to options controls that trigger s

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Ou...

notes:
AI triage (claude): Auto-saving options settings on change improves UX by eliminating the need to explicitly click Save/Apply, reducing accidental loss of changes.
Approach: Add change event handlers to options controls that trigger save logic automatically, or persist settings immediately on property change instead of only on OK/Apply button click
